summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Phase 2 (Half/Quarter Cow Packages) and Phase 3 (Steak Boxes) features. Fixed critical cart bug preventing packages/boxes from being added. All backend APIs working (25/25 tests passed). Cart and Stripe checkout flow fully functional.

bugs_fixed.issue: Cart addToCart function crashed with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading replace)' when adding packages/boxes
bugs_fixed.root_cause: CartContext.addToCart expected 3 arguments (product, weight, subscribe) with string price format, but packages/boxes passed only 1 argument with numeric price
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated CartContext.jsx to handle package/box types separately with fixed pricing, while maintaining backward compatibility for regular weight-based products

bugs_fixed.issue: POST /api/packages returned 500 error due to invalid package creation logic
bugs_fixed.root_cause: packages.py was inserting an empty document first to get an ID, creating invalid records in database
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated create_package to use uuid4 for ID generation instead of inserting empty document

bugs_fixed.issue: Invalid package record in database causing GET /api/packages to fail
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Previous bug created an empty package document without required fields
bugs_fixed.fix: Cleaned up invalid package records from MongoDB

critical_code_review_comments: CartContext now properly handles 3 product types: regular (weight-based), package, and box
Packages API correctly returns Quarter Cow ($749) and Half Cow ($1399) packages with all items
Boxes API correctly returns all 4 steak boxes: Wagyu Luxury ($299), Wagyu Starter ($149), American Steakhouse ($179), Master Cuts ($199)
Stripe checkout integration working - successfully redirects to Stripe with correct amounts
BBQ products have all upcharge fields (wagyuUpcharge, grassFedUpcharge, dryAgedUpcharge)
seed_data_creation: Test packages and boxes created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 and Phase 3 features fully tested and working. Cart now supports 3 item types: regular products (weight-based pricing), packages (fixed price), and boxes (fixed price). Stripe checkout successfully creates sessions and redirects to Stripe. All 4 steak boxes and 2 cow packages are seeded and displaying correctly on frontend.

details: All boxes have items and features arrays
Checkout page displays order summary correctly
Pay button redirects to Stripe checkout
Stripe shows correct amount (US$299.00 for Wagyu Luxury Bundle)
All packages show savings badges (17% OFF, 18% OFF)
Add to Cart buttons functional on all items
All BBQ products have basePrice field
All BBQ products have wagyuUpcharge field
All BBQ products have grassFedUpcharge field
All BBQ products have dryAgedUpcharge field
